item.title: MONDAY'S 100% TRUTH.
item.description: Truer words were never spoken.
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: Boyfriend memes Pt2 (aka things my boyfriend and I send to each other)
item.description:
Some of these have a history and some just give us the giggles.
I find stairs very difficult because of chronic illness and I feel this.
This one just speaks to me.
Makes a big difference.
My favourite bucket.
I like to send these to him because he did physics at uni and I don't even know what the funny S/F bracket thing is. So I send it and then look at him expectantly so he can explain the maths to me so I can forget again later xD
I am this snowman.
"It's the Dara Ó Briain bus" we shout whenever we see these on the road.
At one point I think 5 of my friends were in MLMs, it's just the one now. I'd like to say it's because they saw the light but nah, they just never made any money.
I think Mary Kay and Avon are the only ones they haven't tried.
I can see the samurai every time I read this.
I didn't realise how much WH I knew without knowing it was WH until I met my partner.
Visible relief honestly.
Have to hide the pizza boxes or the betrayal memes start flying.
Magic Bounce Stored Power Espeon bloody hurts.
item.dc:creator: ShinyKokuei7

item.title: What if I told you that it's another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur?
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
i guess
they all look like Steve Jobs
big bags of weed are probably the best gift
happens a lot on imgur
damn Wisconsin are you guys ok?
classic Michael G.
never played that, how well did the controller work?
Think this through with me, let me know your mind Wo-oh, what I want to know is, are you kind?
holding hands
I have no idea what’s going on
true enough
tv/monitor just has a printout or the game screen?
can depend on how likely the other person is to pee
yeah this meme is infinity years old. i still like it
cool art
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck can’t handle car wash.
item.description:
https://x.com/stonkking4/status/1780303955811278884?s=46
Can’t handle a car wash, puts you out of warranty. I wonder what would happen if it rains?
item.dc:creator: djhash

item.title: So... Something happened.
item.description:
I have been chosen. Friend was moving and unable to take her. She was alone and hungry in the old house when we picked her up. She was happy we were taking her, almost jumped into my brother's arms when we found her. But she wasn't happy about the bath at her new house.
Her name is Sugar Pie. She was a very smelly cat, but all clean and drying off.
Dry and wanting scritches. She came home with me Friday. Since we have really bonded. She is the sweetest girl.
She also blends in with my blanket. But seriously, i needed a companion i can love on & so did she. Her human died a few years back and she never quite bonded with my friend. But I have been chosen! $300 in cat related stuff later and she is properly spoiled. Non violent belly rub tax
item.dc:creator: fititallinyourmouth

item.title: Millionaire stops cosplaying as poorperson when he realizes it's superhard to exist with health issues and noinsurance or money
item.description: Even while doing his "social media experiment" he had the luxury and privilege to know that he could quit anytime

item.title: I mean, $10 for a tin of cards isn't a BAD deal...
item.description: Aside from the rare expensive indulgence (Bought a Onewheel last year) I don't really spend much money on myself aside from thrift stores, so I could afford to go a little nuts today. I don't even play the Pokemon TCG. I just like the cards.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: Steve was always looking out for us.
item.description: Edit: The recent documentary "Quiet on the set" shed light on a lot of fucked up stuff that happened to the child actors on various Nickelodeon shows, Dan Schneider was the producer, writer, co-produced and actor on lots of those shows. "All That, Kenan & Kel, The Amanda Show, iCarly, Drake & Josh" many more
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: Just venting...feel free to ignore
item.description: This is probably gonna be an incoherent rant, but thats whats going on in my head so yeah. The meme is probably the most concise way Im able to say how I feel. Basically if I had a button in front of me that would magically turn me into a woman I would instantly press it. But I dont want to be transgender. I dont want to deal with changing my body manually, I dont want to deal with people hating me for it. I wish my brain was just okay with the packaging it came in, but it is not. Sometimes there are days where I think Im just imagining it all and Im completely fine with being male, but for the most part Im not. Another thing that frustrates me is that I cant even explain to myself why I want to be a woman. It just feels right I guess. But its something that has the potential to destroy my life so I would at least like to understand it myself. Im 22 now and have been struggling with this for a very long time. The first thought I remember which I now attribute to being trans, was when I was about 10. And while the urge has been constantly increasing, especially the past few years, I still feel like Im not any closer to any answers. The next problem is that while most of my friends would probably be okay with it if I came out, my coworkers would most certainly not. I have a job I really like, in a good company. I would honestly consider doing it for the rest of my life. But I hate most of my coworkers. Almost all of them are right wing, some I would consider far right. The amount of racist, sexist and also transphobe jokes I have heard is way too high for me to even consider coming out. Right now I manage by avoiding political discussions as much as possible, but yeah. So yeah. I have no idea what to do. If anyone read all of that, my condolences, and also thank you.
item.dc:creator: ObviousThrowawayAccountIsObvious

item.title: Cake, cake, cake, cake...day...
item.description: I tried to find my earliest favorite. But after 11 years on Imgur I guess I could only go back 6 years. Original post from @BearRaid and I'm a sucker for a cute story and James Bond.

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Underwaterfall (Pablo Nouvelle Remix) YouTube: https://youtu.be/vDRwrRlCGAs?si=wV2IoNUya2_FcWtt Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/1PiWbkguSD2zPqglEl4ZNh?si=56cfc2d3688c41a0

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos ICM Original / https://twitter.com/PathosMeta
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Lasso Man
item.dc:creator: TheJokerXX

item.title: "My friend and I are weird and send each other weird things" dump #91
item.description:
Boo, kids!
Here, have a cup of bl... tea, plain tea, in my fancy mugs.
Slander. Pure slander.
Been working from home for two weeks cause of the sprained ankle. First day back at work tomorrow - should be fun.
I'll definitely miss the memes.
Bless their little cotton socks.
*tries to look innocent*
I'm a proponent of "Eat, drink, and be scary" but okay.
Getting to experience your favourite music for the first time again... <3
That's just plain rude.
Sleep Token isn't metal.
I normally try to avoid these but: Graveyard Gothy McGoth Face? Graveyard Gothy Mc-fucking-Goth Face?!?! Graveyard Gothy McGoth Face.
No, you may not, NASA.
You get ominous positivity from me and you will like it.
True story.
Yeah, yeah, witchy shit and everything, but if you see a bee struggling, feed it sugar water.
There you are, you've been blessed by a witch. Have fun.
Well I got a cloak at least.
And, as ever, spookiness.
item.dc:creator: TheNephilim337
